category_sources: source_facts.description says dvdbackup rips DVDs from the command line; official SourceForge page states it is a tool to rip video DVDs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official SourceForge page use dvdbackup.
docs_sources: Official dvdbackup SourceForge website contains the project about, download, and usage-oriented information and is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge website links project/download pages but no clear official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says command-line DVD ripping; official project page describes ripping video DVDs.
